name: agent-studio
description: Agent Review Studio — local-first human/agent review loop

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @murrmure/flow-dev-kit build && pnpm --filter @murrmure/cli build && pnpm --parallel --filter @murrmure/hub-daemon --filter @murrmure/shell-web dev
scripts.check:boundaries: depcruise packages/runtime-kernel/src packages/runtime-contracts/src packages/runtime-persistence/src packages/runtime-adapter-http/src packages/studio-contracts/src packages/studio-hub-core/src packages/studio-hub-persistence/src packages/studio-hub-daemon/src packages/studio-hub-client/src packages/shell-web/src packages/cli/src packages/flow-dev-kit/src --config dependency-cruiser.config.cjs
